target.title: [Bug]: Outbound transcript mirrors ignore configured session.store
target.body:
## Bug type
Behavior bug (incorrect output/state without crash)

## Beta release blocker
No

## Summary
Outbound transcript mirrors ignore the configured `session.store` when appending mirrored assistant replies, so mirrored transcript entries can be skipped or written against the default store instead of the operator-configured store.

## Steps to reproduce
1. Use current `upstream/main` at `73930764e6` with `session.store` configured to a custom session store path, including paths with `{agentId}` templates.
2. Create or use an outbound mirror path that calls `appendAssistantMessageToSessionTranscript` without an explicit `storePath`.
3. Send an outbound reply that should be mirrored into the session transcript.
4. Observe the mirror append resolving the store from the default agent store path instead of the configured store.

## Expected behavior
Transcript mirror appends should resolve the same configured session store used by the active runtime config when callers pass `config` but omit `storePath`. For `{agentId}` store templates, the agent should come from the explicit `agentId` or from the `agent:<id>:...` session key.

## Actual behavior
On current `upstream/main`, `src/config/sessions/transcript.ts` still falls back to `resolveDefaultSessionStorePath(params.agentId)` in append paths, while outbound mirror callers pass `config` but no `storePath`. That means a custom `session.store` is ignored for transcript mirror appends.

## OpenClaw version
`upstream/main` at `73930764e6`

## Operating system
macOS local source checkout; behavior is source-level/runtime-path independent.

## Install method
Source checkout with `pnpm test` validation.

## Model
NOT_ENOUGH_INFO

## Provider / routing chain
NOT_ENOUGH_INFO

## Additional provider/model setup details
This is not provider-specific. It is in session transcript mirror store resolution.

## Logs, screenshots, and evidence
`upstream/main` evidence:

`src/config/sessions/transcript.ts` resolves append stores with `resolveDefaultSessionStorePath(params.agentId)`.

Outbound mirror callers pass `config` but no `storePath`:

- `src/infra/outbound/source-reply-mirror.ts`
- `src/infra/outbound/outbound-send-service.ts`
- `src/infra/outbound/deliver.ts`

Local regression tests on the fix branch cover both fixed custom store paths and `{agentId}` templated stores.

## Impact and severity
Affected: users/operators who configure `session.store` away from the default per-agent session store and rely on outbound transcript mirroring.
Severity: Medium; channel delivery succeeds, but transcript bookkeeping can be missing or written against the wrong store.
Frequency: Always for affected mirror appends when the session exists only in the configured store.
Consequence: mirrored outbound replies do not appear in the intended session transcript, reducing session history fidelity and auditability.

## Additional information
A fix branch exists that makes append fallback honor `config.session.store`, preserves explicit `storePath` priority, and derives the store agent from `sessionKey` when `agentId` is omitted.
target.author: youngting520
